questions.question: What 1981 movie launched an adventure series about Indiana Jones, the intrepid archaeologist who fought Nazis and saved precious artifacts?
What iconic spokesperson was known for crashing through any barriers when called by little kids to provide them a sugary drink?
What group's "Rappers Delight" was the first hip-hop song to enter the Top 40?
Where did Israeli commandos make a daring and successful raid to free hostages taken by Palestinian terrorists being held in Uganda?
What was being advertised with the phrase, "Hey good lookin'. We'll be back to pick you up later!"
